stories.headline: I stopped bracing for the sound that never came.
stories.excerpt: After three deployments, Marcus found his way back to sleep — and to his daughter — through eighteen months of integrated care.
stories.author: Marcus

stories.headline: My daughter is the first in our family to feel safe.
stories.excerpt: Amira and her family rebuilt a quiet life in a new country — with clinical support, peer community, and time.
stories.author: Amira

stories.headline: I came for technique. I left with a framework for care.
stories.excerpt: Dr. Lena Park on what she carried home from our clinician fellowship — and how it changed her practice.
stories.author: Dr. Lena Park
